title: Entry Identity, Idempotent Upsert, Revisions, and Deletion Semantics · Language Lens: Feed Go Reingestion Reconciliation
summary: Every poll inserts duplicates, title edits create new posts, reused GUIDs overwrite unrelated content, disappeared entries are deleted immediately, and revision causes vanish. Predict the reader decision, feed or API contract, Go and PostgreSQL ownership, bounded failure, and observable evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the feed go reingestion reconciliation increment in idempotent versioned entry ingestion model. Learners progress through prediction…
objectives: Prove replay, reordered items, duplicate IDs, corrected dates, moved links, and partial failure converge on the same admitted state.
Treat absence from one finite feed page as weak evidence and apply explicit tombstone, retention, correction, and publisher-delete policy.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
